title: Jiu Jitsu Basic Course - BJJ Lab Zürich
text: HOW TO START? Home > Programs > Jiu Jitsu Basic Course JIU JITSU BASIC COURSE In our five week basic course you will learn everything you need to know to get started with BJJ. No prior knowledge is required and you don’t have to be in shape to start your journey. Watch the video OUR ONE WEEK FREE TRIAL To help you determine if BJJ Lab Zürich is the right fit for you, we offer a free one-week trial. During this period, you can fully immerse yourself in our classes.We provide free loaner uniforms for both gi and nogi trainings, ensuring you have everything you need to get started. New to BJJ? Check out our beginner guide. SCHEDULE YOUR FIRST CLASS OUR FIVE WEEK INTRO PACKAGE To make it easy to get started, we offer a five week intro package for new members that includes access to all trainings and a uniform (gi or nogi set). Uniform included 4 basics classes per week 22 trainings per week Gym access during classes Access to our video library Structured curriculum Qualified coaches LEARN MORE READY TO TRY JIU JITSU? Send us a message on Whatsapp or through our contact form to schedule your first class. We are happy to answer any questions and look forward to meeting you!
